subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Youth Who hath sacrificed His soul in the path of God, the Sovereign, the All-Compelling, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الذی فدی نفسه فی سبیل الله الملک المهیمن العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer
